note: Classified as integration (not reporting) because it owns a table and exposes a write service. Rows are append-only — no update or delete operations are permitted.

responsibilities: Accept append-only audit entries from leave-request services
Persist immutable audit records with actor, action, status transition, and optional snapshot
Provide read-only audit trail queries for managers and HR Admin
exclusions: Leave request state management — owned by MOD-001 leave-request
Notification dispatch — owned by MOD-005 notification
Any update or delete of audit records — prohibited by NFR-002

dependencies.reason: Resolve actor name for audit entry reads

requirementMapping.description: Every state change on a leave request must produce an immutable audit entry
Repository exposes insert only — no update or delete methods
Full leave history queryable per request and per employee

columns.name: actor_id
columns.description: FK -> employees.id — who performed the action

columns.name: snapshot
columns.description: Optional point-in-time snapshot of the LeaveRequest

service.name: append
steps: insert audit entry — no domain layer, no update, no delete
service.description: Appends an immutable audit entry for a leave request state change
errorConditions: AuditWriteError — database insert failure; caller should surface this as a system error

query_service.name: getByLeaveRequest
query_service.description: Returns full chronological audit trail for a single leave request

query_service.name: getByEmployee
query_service.signature: getByEmployee(filters: { employeeId: string, year?: number }): Promise<AuditEntryReadDto[]>
query_service.description: Returns all audit entries for leave requests belonging to an employee

rules.name: AppendOnly
rules.condition: any update or delete is attempted
rules.action: method does not exist — not exposed on repository interface

api.description: Audit trail for a specific leave request
All audit entries for an employee's leave requests
